User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user in the Siong marketplace.

uid.description: The unique identifier for the user.

photoURL.description: The URL of the user's profile photo.

role.description: The user's role in the system.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the user was created.

Product.title: Product
Product.description: Represents a product listed in the Siong marketplace.

description.description: A detailed description of the product.

category.description: The category the product belongs to.

image.description: The URL of the product's image.

sellerId.description: The UID of the seller who listed the product.

sellerName.description: The display name of the seller.

stock.description: The number of items available in stock.

status.description: The current status of the product.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the product was listed.

Order.title: Order
Order.description: Represents a purchase made by a buyer.

buyerId.description: The UID of the buyer who made the purchase.

totalAmount.description: The total amount of the order.

status.description: The current status of the order.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the order was placed.
